reviews.comment:
Parador obligado para el viajero, sea quien viene del norte o va a esos destinos. Lugar cómodo para hospedarse, asearse o simplemente comer algo y seguir viaje. Gente cordial y sencilla. Buen clima.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for travelers, whether they're coming from the north or heading to those destinations. A comfortable place to stay, freshen up, or simply grab a bite to eat before continuing your journey. Friendly and down-to-earth people. Pleasant weather.
